summary: Surah Al-Munafiqun exposes the traits of hypocrites: false testimony, using oaths as shields, arrogance, and obstructing Allah’s path. It warns that their appearances and eloquence conceal sealed hearts, and that Allah will not forgive them. Believers are cautioned not to be distracted by wealth and children, and urged to spend before death comes and regret is futile.
